description_long: This is a compact, floor-standing electric radiator with a rectangular, boxy form and a sturdy metal casing. The front face features a wide, horizontal grille for air output, with a subtle brand marking in the lower right corner. The sides are slim, with visible control knobs and a power cord attachment, indicating its electrical operation. The rear panel is mostly solid, with a cable neatly looped and two small mounting or carrying brackets. The radiator stands on two short, robust legs, elevating it slightly above the ground for stability and airflow. Its overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on efficient heat distribution and ease of placement in urban indoor environments.
description: A compact, floor-standing electric radiator with a horizontal grille, control knobs, and a power cord, designed for efficient indoor heating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide horizontal grille and brand marking, with a clean, flat surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, control knobs, and power cord entry point.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel, cable loop, and small mounting brackets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the cable running along the side.
attribute_pipe_connections: single power cord entry on lower side, no visible water pipe connections
